ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "date" INTEGER /* Date of the weather data */,
  "time_of_day" TEXT /* Time of the day when the data was collected */,
  "max_temp" REAL /* Maximum temperature */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Humidity */,
  "cloudiness" INTEGER /* Cloudiness */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed */,
  "data_source" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor or method used to collect the data */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_data_source FOREIGN KEY ("data_source") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "lng" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the city above sea level */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each country (ISO code) */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the station is located */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of the weather station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_stations_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station where the sensor is located */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "sensor_model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed */,
  "last_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data value */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the data was collected */,
  "date" INTEGER /* Date of the data */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the data */,
  "data_source" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_values_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_values_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_values_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_values_data_source FOREIGN KEY ("data_source") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the data was collected */,
  "date" INTEGER /* Date of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "data_source" INTEGER /* ID of the data source accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_source FOREIGN KEY ("data_source") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city for which the forecast was generated */,
  "forecast_date" INTEGER /* Date of the forecast */,
  "forecast_type" TEXT /* Type of the forecast (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "forecast_model" TEXT /* Model used to generate the forecast */,
  "forecast_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the forecast */,
  "forecast_source" TEXT /* Source of the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_forecasts_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast value */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the forecast */,
  "forecast_model" TEXT /* Model used to generate the forecast */,
  "forecast_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_values_forecast_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id") REFERENCES weather_forecasts ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_values_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id")
)
